title: Kiln model usage
description: Provider-neutral model usage and accounting fields for a model invocation.

input_tokens.description: Input tokens consumed by the model invocation.

output_tokens.description: Output tokens produced by the model invocation.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens accounted for by the model invocation.

cached_input_tokens.description: Input tokens served from a provider or adapter cache.

reasoning_tokens.description: Output-side reasoning tokens, when reported separately by the provider or adapter.

billable_input_tokens.description: Input tokens counted for billing or budget accounting.

billable_output_tokens.description: Output tokens counted for billing or budget accounting.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated provider-neutral monetary cost in USD.

measurement.description: Whether usage was estimated, actual, or reconciled.
